executive_summary: Latest updates from 6 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 6 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Iran drone strike on US Embassy in Saudi Arabia hit CIA station: Report. Iran says Iraqi ships can pass Strait of Hormuz as transits tick up. Iran warns of 'big surprise' for US, Israel. Drone attacks damage Kuwait power, water plants. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Iran says Iraqi ships can pass Strait of Hormuz as transits tick up
key_developments.detail: Iran has announced that Iraqi ships are free to pass the Strait of Hormuz, the latest sign of Tehran easing its stranglehold on the critical conduit for global energy supplies. key_developments.headline: Drone attacks damage Kuwait power, water plants
key_developments.detail: Iranian drone attacks caused “serious material damage” at two electricity and water distillation plants in Kuwait, the country’s Ministry of Electricity, Water and Renewable Energy said. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
